scope: baseline save/diff commands for incremental adoption
--baseline flag on analyze and check commands for known-finding filtering
notes: drift baseline save: snapshots all findings by SHA256 fingerprint to .drift-baseline.json
drift baseline diff: re-analyzes and shows only new findings vs saved baseline
--baseline flag on analyze/check: filters out known findings before output and severity gate
Fingerprint is deterministic: SHA256(signal + file + start_line + end_line + title)[:16]
Baseline file is versioned JSON; load_baseline validates structure
